TableName.description: The name of the table containing the requested item

Key.description: A map of attribute names to AttributeValue objects, representing the primary key of the item to retrieve

ProjectionExpression.description: A string that identifies one or more attributes to retrieve from the table

ExpressionAttributeNames.description: One or more substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression

ConsistentRead.description: If set to true, the operation uses strongly consistent reads; otherwise, eventually consistent reads are used
